attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT IAM_USER_KEY, BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME, IAM_APPLICATION_KEY, SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG,IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT,
 BICAFE_ROLE_NAME,BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT ,  L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,BK_SALES_TERR_ASSGNMNT_TYPE_CD  FROM 
( SELECT IAM_USER_KEY, BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME , BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME BICAFE_ROLE_NAME, APP.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY, SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG, 1 IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT
,  CURRENT_DATE CURR_DATE,1  territory_code ,BK_SALES_TERR_ASSGNMNT_TYPE_CD FROM $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_SALES_TERR_LNK  LNK
INNER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_APPLICATION APP ON	APP.SK_APPLICATION_ID_INT=1388 AND LNK.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY=APP.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY
 WHERE  SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'     AND( (IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT = 0)  or (IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT = 0 and STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG='E' and BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME LIKE '%IBOT%'))
UNION
SELECT IAM_USER_KEY, BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME ,BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME  BICAFE_ROLE_NAME, APP.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY, SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG, 1 IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT
, CURRENT_DATE CURR_DATE,2  territory_code,BK_SALES_TERR_ASSGNMNT_TYPE_CD  FROM $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_SALES_TERR_LNK  LNK
INNER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_APPLICATION APP ON	APP.SK_APPLICATION_ID_INT=1388 AND LNK.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY=APP.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY
 WHERE  SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'     AND( (IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT = 0)  or (IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT = 0 and STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG='E' and BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME LIKE '%IBOT%'))
 UNION
 SELECT IAM_USER_KEY, BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME , BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME BICAFE_ROLE_NAME, APP.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY, SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG, 1 IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT
, CURRENT_DATE CURR_DATE,3  territory_code,BK_SALES_TERR_ASSGNMNT_TYPE_CD  FROM $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_SALES_TERR_LNK LNK
INNER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_APPLICATION APP ON	APP.SK_APPLICATION_ID_INT=1388 AND LNK.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY=APP.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY 
 WHERE  SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'     AND( (IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT = 0)  or (IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT = 0 and STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG='E' and BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME LIKE '%IBOT%'))
 UNION
 SELECT IAM_USER_KEY, BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME ,BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME BICAFE_ROLE_NAME, APP.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY, SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG, 1 IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT

 WHERE  SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'     AND( (IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT = 0)  or (IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT = 0 and STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG='E' and BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME LIKE '%IBOT%'))
 UNION
 SELECT IAM_USER_KEY, BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME ,BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME BICAFE_ROLE_NAME , APP.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY, SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG, 1 IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT
, CURRENT_DATE CURR_DATE,5  territory_code,BK_SALES_TERR_ASSGNMNT_TYPE_CD  FROM $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_SALES_TERR_LNK  LNK
INNER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_APPLICATION APP ON	APP.SK_APPLICATION_ID_INT=1388 AND LNK.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY=APP.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY

, CURRENT_DATE CURR_DATE,6  territory_code ,BK_SALES_TERR_ASSGNMNT_TYPE_CD FROM $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_SALES_TERR_LNK  LNK
INNER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_APPLICATION APP ON	APP.SK_APPLICATION_ID_INT=1388 AND LNK.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY=APP.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY
 WHERE  SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'     AND( (IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT = 0)  or (IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT = 0 and STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG='E' and BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME LIKE '%IBOT%'))
 UNION
 SELECT IAM_USER_KEY, BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME ,BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME  BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME, APP.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY, SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG, 1 IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT
, CURRENT_DATE CURR_DATE,7  territory_code ,BK_SALES_TERR_ASSGNMNT_TYPE_CD FROM $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_SALES_TERR_LNK  LNK
INNER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_APPLICATION APP ON	APP.SK_APPLICATION_ID_INT=1388 AND LNK.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY=APP.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY
 WHERE  SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'     AND( (IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT = 0)  or (IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT = 0 and STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG='E' and BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME LIKE '%IBOT%'))
 UNION
 SELECT IAM_USER_KEY, BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME , BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME  BICAFE_ROLE_NAME, APP.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY, SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG, 1 IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT,
 CURRENT_DATE CURR_DATE,8  territory_code ,BK_SALES_TERR_ASSGNMNT_TYPE_CD FROM $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_SALES_TERR_LNK  LNK
 INNER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_APPLICATION APP ON	APP.SK_APPLICATION_ID_INT=1388 AND LNK.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY=APP.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY
 WHERE  SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'     AND( (IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT = 0)  or (IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT = 0 and STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG='E' and BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME LIKE '%IBOT%'))
  UNION
 SELECT IAM_USER_KEY, BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME , BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME  BICAFE_ROLE_NAME, APP.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY, SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG, 1 IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT,
 CURRENT_DATE CURR_DATE,9  territory_code ,BK_SALES_TERR_ASSGNMNT_TYPE_CD FROM $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_SALES_TERR_LNK  LNK
 INNER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_APPLICATION APP ON	APP.SK_APPLICATION_ID_INT=1388 AND LNK.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY=APP.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY
 WHERE SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'   AND( (IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT = 0)  or (IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT = 0 and STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG='E' and BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME LIKE '%IBOT%'))
 UNION
 SELECT IAM_USER_KEY, BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME ,BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME  BICAFE_ROLE_NAME, APP.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY, SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG, 1 IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT,
 CURRENT_DATE CURR_DATE,10  territory_code ,BK_SALES_TERR_ASSGNMNT_TYPE_CD FROM $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_SALES_TERR_LNK  LNK
 INNER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_APPLICATION APP ON	APP.SK_APPLICATION_ID_INT=1388 AND LNK.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY=APP.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY
 WHERE  SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'     AND( (IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT = 0)  or (IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT = 0 and STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG='E' and BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME LIKE '%IBOT%'))
 UNION
 SELECT IAM_USER_KEY, BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME ,BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME  BICAFE_ROLE_NAME, APP.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY, SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG, 1 IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT,
 CURRENT_DATE CURR_DATE,11  territory_code ,BK_SALES_TERR_ASSGNMNT_TYPE_CD  FROM $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_SALES_TERR_LNK  LNK
 INNER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_APPLICATION APP ON	APP.SK_APPLICATION_ID_INT=1388 AND LNK.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY=APP.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY
 WHERE  SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'     AND( (IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT = 0)  or (IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT = 0 and STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG='E' and BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME LIKE '%IBOT%'))
 UNION
 SELECT  IAM_USER_KEY, BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME , BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME  BICAFE_ROLE_NAME, APP.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY, SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG, 1 IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT,
CURRENT_DATE CURR_DATE,12  territory_code ,BK_SALES_TERR_ASSGNMNT_TYPE_CD  FROM $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_SALES_TERR_LNK  LNK
INNER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_APPLICATION APP ON	APP.SK_APPLICATION_ID_INT=1388 AND LNK.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY=APP.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY
 WHERE  SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'     AND( (IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT = 0)  or (IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT = 0 and STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG='E' and BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME LIKE '%IBOT%'))
 UNION
 SELECT IAM_USER_KEY, BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME ,BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME  BICAFE_ROLE_NAME, APP.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY, SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG, 1 IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT,
CURRENT_DATE CURR_DATE,13  territory_code ,BK_SALES_TERR_ASSGNMNT_TYPE_CD FROM $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_SALES_TERR_LNK  LNK
INNER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_APPLICATION APP ON	APP.SK_APPLICATION_ID_INT=1388 AND LNK.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY=APP.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY
 WHERE  SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'     AND( (IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT = 0)  or (IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT = 0 and STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG='E' and BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME LIKE '%IBOT%'))
 UNION
 SELECT IAM_USER_KEY, BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME ,BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME BICAFE_ROLE_NAME, APP.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY, SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG, 1 IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT,
CURRENT_DATE CURR_DATE,14  territory_code ,BK_SALES_TERR_ASSGNMNT_TYPE_CD FROM $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_SALES_TERR_LNK  LNK
INNER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_APPLICATION APP ON	APP.SK_APPLICATION_ID_INT=1388 AND LNK.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY=APP.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY
 WHERE  SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'     AND( (IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT = 0)  or (IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT = 0 and STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG='E' and BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME LIKE '%IBOT%'))
 UNION
 SELECT IAM_USER_KEY, BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME ,BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME  BICAFE_ROLE_NAME, APP.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY, SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG, 1 IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT,
CURRENT_DATE CURR_DATE,15  territory_code  ,BK_SALES_TERR_ASSGNMNT_TYPE_CD FROM $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_SALES_TERR_LNK  LNK
INNER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_APPLICATION APP ON	APP.SK_APPLICATION_ID_INT=1388 AND LNK.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY=APP.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY
 WHERE  SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'     AND( (IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT = 0)  or (IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT = 0 and STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG='E' and BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME LIKE '%IBOT%'))
)  ST
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_YEAR
ON CURR_DATE BETWEEN FISCAL_YEAR_START_DATE AND FISCAL_YEAR_END_DATE
INNER JOIN 
(SELECT RANK() OVER 
			(ORDER BY 
				L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR)   TERRITORY_RANK,
L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR FROM 
(SELECT DISTINCT  L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR   L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR
FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY  WHERE SALES_TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE ='CORP. REVENUE')  SLS_HIER) SLS_HIER
ON ST.TERRITORY_CODE=SLS_HIER.TERRITORY_RANK
UNION
SELECT IAM_USER_KEY, BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME, IAM_APPLICATION_KEY, SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG,IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT,
 BICAFE_ROLE_NAME,BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT ,  territory_code,BK_SALES_TERR_ASSGNMNT_TYPE_CD FROM 
( SELECT IAM_USER_KEY, BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME ,BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME  BICAFE_ROLE_NAME, APP.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY, SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG, 1 IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT,
CURRENT_DATE CURR_DATE,'WW'  territory_code ,BK_SALES_TERR_ASSGNMNT_TYPE_CD FROM $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_SALES_TERR_LNK  LNK
INNER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_APPLICATION APP ON	APP.SK_APPLICATION_ID_INT=1388 AND LNK.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY=APP.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY
 WHERE  SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'     AND IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT = 0    AND  BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME = 'GFO'
)  ST
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_YEAR
ON CURR_DATE BETWEEN FISCAL_YEAR_START_DATE AND FISCAL_YEAR_END_DATE

SEL  
DD_CEC_ID, 
IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT, 
BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME, 
BI_CAFE_ROLE_NAME,
TERRITORY_CODE,
BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM, 
DATA_SOURCE_NAME,
SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
COALESCE(BK_SALES_TERR_ASSGNMNT_TYPE_CD,'DR')
FROM
(SEL  
DD_CEC_ID, 
IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT, 
BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME, 
BI_CAFE_ROLE_NAME,
TERRITORY_CODE,
BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM, 
SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
BK_SALES_TERR_ASSGNMNT_TYPE_CD,
DATA_SOURCE_NAME,
MIN(OUTPUT.IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT)  OVER (PARTITION BY OUTPUT.DD_CEC_ID,OUTPUT.TERRITORY_CODE,
OUTPUT.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME, OUTPUT.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM ORDER BY OUTPUT.IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT )  as MIN_IAM_LEVEL
FROM (
SEL  
SM.BK_BCBD_MAILER_ALIAS_ADDR DD_CEC_ID, 
ST.IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT, 
ST.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME, 
ST.BI_CAFE_ROLE_NAME,
SALES.SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR TERRITORY_CODE,
ST.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM, 
CASE ST.STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG WHEN 'S' THEN 'SHARE'
WHEN 'E' THEN 'IAM' END DATA_SOURCE_NAME,
ST.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
ST.BK_SALES_TERR_ASSGNMNT_TYPE_CD  FROM
$$SECURITYVWDB.N_APSP_BCBD_SALES_TERR_LNK ST
INNER JOIN $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_APSP_BCBD_USER SM
ON ST.BCBD_USER_KEY = SM.BCBD_USER_KEY AND SM.BK_BCBD_USER_TYPE='MAILER ALIAS'
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_TERRITORY SALES
ON SALES.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=ST.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
UNION
SELECT 
USR.DD_CEC_ID, 
ST.IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT, 
ST.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME, 
ST.BICAFE_ROLE_NAME, 
ST.TERRITORY_CODE, 
CAST(ST.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT AS VARCHAR(4))  BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM, 
CASE ST.STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG WHEN 'S' THEN 'SHARE'
WHEN 'E' THEN 'IAM' END DATA_SOURCE_NAME, 
ST.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
ST.BK_SALES_TERR_ASSGNMNT_TYPE_CD 
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_SALES_TERR_LNK_LVL0 ST
INNER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_USER USR
ON ST.IAM_USER_KEY=USR.IAM_USER_KEY  AND USR.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'
UNION
SEL 
USR.DD_CEC_ID, 
ST.IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT, 
ST.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME, 
ST.BI_CAFE_ROLE_NAME,
SALES.SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR TERRITORY_CODE,
ST.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM, 
CASE ST.STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG WHEN 'S' THEN 'SHARE'
WHEN 'E' THEN 'IAM' END DATA_SOURCE_NAME, 
ST.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
ST.BK_SALES_TERR_ASSGNMNT_TYPE_CD   FROM
$$SECURITYVWDB.N_APSP_BCBD_SALES_TERR_LNK ST
INNER JOIN $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_APSP_BCBD_USER SM
ON ST.BCBD_USER_KEY = SM.BCBD_USER_KEY AND SM.BK_BCBD_USER_TYPE='IAM USER'
INNER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_USER USR
ON SM.IAM_USER_KEY=USR.IAM_USER_KEY AND USR.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_TERRITORY_TV  SALES
ON SALES.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=ST.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY 
INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH  FIS_MTH
ON BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT=ST.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM AND 
FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE BETWEEN SALES.START_TV_DATE AND SALES.END_TV_DATE  AND BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT=12

UNION

SEL 
USR.DD_CEC_ID, 
ST.IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT, 
ST.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME, 
ST.BI_CAFE_ROLE_NAME,
SALES.SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR TERRITORY_CODE,
ST.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM, 
CASE ST.STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG WHEN 'S' THEN 'SHARE'
WHEN 'E' THEN 'IAM' END DATA_SOURCE_NAME, 
ST.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
ST.BK_SALES_TERR_ASSGNMNT_TYPE_CD  FROM
$$SECURITYVWDB.N_APSP_BCBD_SALES_TERR_LNK ST
INNER JOIN $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_APSP_BCBD_USER SM
ON ST.BCBD_USER_KEY = SM.BCBD_USER_KEY AND SM.BK_BCBD_USER_TYPE='IAM USER'
INNER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_USER USR
ON SM.IAM_USER_KEY=USR.IAM_USER_KEY AND USR.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_TERRITORY_TV  SALES
ON SALES.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=ST.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY 
INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH  FIS_MTH
ON BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT=ST.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM AND 
FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE BETWEEN SALES.START_TV_DATE AND SALES.END_TV_DATE  AND 
DV_CURRENT_FISCAL_MONTH_FLAG='Y'

) OUTPUT ) MIN_LVL
where
MIN_LVL.IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT=MIN_LVL.MIN_IAM_LEVEL
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY DD_CEC_ID,IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT,
BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,TERRITORY_CODE,
BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM,BK_SALES_TERR_ASSGNMNT_TYPE_CD ORDER BY IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT ASC) =1
